requirement_topic.en: KEGOC and Kazakhstan Grid Interface for High-Power Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 高功率充电的KEGOC及哈萨克斯坦电网接口
requirement_topic.zht: 高功率充電的KEGOC及哈薩克斯坦電網介面

summary.en: High-power charging hubs can become a distribution or transmission planning issue in Kazakhstan. KEGOC is the national electricity grid operator and system operator, while the practical connection route may involve a local distribution company, project owner, municipality, or industrial-site network. Review may focus on connection capacity, transformer loading, protection, metering, power quality, reactive power, demand management, telemetry, and commissioning.
summary.zh: 高功率充电站在哈萨克斯坦可能成为配电或输电规划事项。KEGOC是国家电网运营商和系统运营商，但实际接入路径可能涉及本地配电公司、项目业主、市政机构或工业园区网络。审查重点可能包括接入容量、变压器负载、保护、计量、电能质量、无功、需求管理、遥测和投运。
summary.zht: 高功率充電站在哈薩克斯坦可能成為配電或輸電規劃事項。KEGOC是國家電網營運商和系統營運商，但實際接入路徑可能涉及本地配電公司、項目業主、市政機構或工業園區網路。審查重點可能包括接入容量、變壓器負載、保護、計量、電能品質、無功、需求管理、遙測和投運。

standards_or_laws: Kazakhstan electricity grid connection rules and technical conditions
Project-specific power-quality, metering, protection, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China grid studies, load profiles, harmonic reports, charger power-module data, transformer sizing, and protection designs can support Kazakhstan review. They do not replace local technical conditions, available capacity checks, or utility approval for the actual site.
summary.zh: 中国并网研究、负荷曲线、谐波报告、充电模块数据、变压器容量设计和保护设计可支持哈萨克斯坦审查，但不能替代实际站点的本地技术条件、可用容量核查或公用事业批准。
summary.zht: 中國併網研究、負荷曲線、諧波報告、充電模組資料、變壓器容量設計和保護設計可支持哈薩克斯坦審查，但不能替代實際站點的本地技術條件、可用容量核查或公用事業批准。

gap.en: Prepare Kazakhstan site-load forecasts, simultaneity assumptions, harmonic and flicker calculations, transformer and feeder studies, protection coordination, earthing plan, metering design, communication interfaces, emergency shutdown logic, and commissioning procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备哈萨克斯坦站点负荷预测、同时率假设、谐波和闪变计算、变压器及馈线研究、保护配合、接地方案、计量设计、通信接口、紧急停机逻辑和投运程序。
gap.zht: 應準備哈薩克斯坦站點負荷預測、同時率假設、諧波和閃變計算、變壓器及饋線研究、保護配合、接地方案、計量設計、通訊介面、緊急停機邏輯和投運程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected charging sites requiring technical conditions, distribution connection, transmission interface, metering approval, or commissioning approval; project-specific for small private chargers
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese grid connection, charger capacity, site category, and local utility requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product certificates do not approve a Kazakhstan high-power charging site. Local grid capacity, power quality, protection, metering, and commissioning acceptance must be handled separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品证书不会批准哈萨克斯坦高功率充电站点。当地电网容量、电能质量、保护、计量和投运验收必须另行处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品證書不會批准哈薩克斯坦高功率充電站點。當地電網容量、電能品質、保護、計量和投運驗收必須另行處理。
